state.coderResponse:
The implementation is complete and faithful to the contract. All work is done and verified.

## Summary

I executed PRP `P1.M7.T2.S2`, reconciling S1's close-but-divergent `maybeAutoStagePolicy` into a contract-faithful `maybeAutoStage` staging entry-point.

**Changes made (exactly the 6 files the PRP specified):**

1. **`internal/git/stage.go`** (MODIFIED) — Added `(*Git).StagedFileCount() (int, error)` (+ `"strings"` import), a sibling of `HasStagedChanges` that counts staged files via `git diff --cached --name-only`. Uses `TrimRight "\r"` only (not `TrimSpace`) for filename safety; clean index → `(0, nil)`, not an error.

2. **`internal/git/stage_test.go`** (MODIFIED) — Added `TestStagedFileCount_ZeroOnClean` + `TestStagedFileCount_AfterStagingFiles`.

3. **`cmd/stagehand/stage.go`** (NEW) — The sole staging entry-point: the distinct CLI-layer `ErrNothingStaged` sentinel (contrasted with `generate.ErrNothingToCommit`), the extended `stager` interface, and `maybeAutoStage(...) error` per the binding pseudocode (FR16–FR20, git failures wrapped `fmt.Errorf("stage: %w", err)` → exit 1).

4. **`cmd/stagehand/run.go`** (MODIFIED) — Deleted `maybeAutoStagePolicy` + old `stager`; reshaped the call site to `maybeAutoStage` + `mapErrorToExitCode(err)`; added the `ErrNothingStaged → ui.ExitNothingToCommit` branch.

5. **`cmd/stagehand/run_test.go`** (MODIFIED) — Removed the 4 superseded staging tests + `fakeStager`; added the `ErrNothingStaged` row to `TestMapErrorToExitCode`.

6. **`cmd/stagehand/stage_test.go`** (NEW) — 7 MOCKING cases with a stateful `fakeStager`, including the previously-missing "auto-stage then proceed" happy path.

**Validation gates — all green:**
- L1 `gofmt -l` clean · L2 `go build ./...` OK · L3 `go vet` clean
- L4 `go test ./cmd/stagehand/ ./internal/git/ -v` passes (StagedFileCount + all 7 cases)
- L5 `go test ./...` passes — no regression

**Verified:** `maybeAutoStage` is the sole staging entry-point; `--no-auto-stage`/`AutoStageAll=false` return `ErrNothingStaged` without calling `AddAll`; `--all` force-stages; FR18 notice carries the `(N files)` count; both sentinels map to exit 2; notices go to stderr only (FR51); no testify; `pkg/stagehand`/`internal/generate`/`internal/provider`/`internal/config`/`main.go`/`providers.go`/`config.go` unchanged (v2 seam intact).

**One observation (non-blocking):** `TestPersistentFlags_Registered` (S1's, untouched) fails *only* when run via an isolated `-run` filter — a pre-existing latent bug (cobra v1.10.2's `Flags()` doesn't merge persistent flags without `MergePersistentFlags()`). It passes in the actual full-suite validation gate due to cross-test side effects, so it's not a blocker and is out of this task's scope (flag registration, not staging). I left it alone.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "P1.M7.T2.S2 implemented and all 5 validation gates pass. Reconciled S1's maybeAutoStagePolicy into the contract-faithful maybeAutoStage(...) error sole staging entry-point. Added (*Git).StagedFileCount() to internal/git/stage.go (+strings import, +2 tests), created cmd/stagehand/stage.go (ErrNothingStaged sentinel distinct from generate.ErrNothingToCommit, extended stager interface, maybeAutoStage per FR16-FR20 pseudocode), edited cmd/stagehand/run.go (deleted old maybeAutoStagePolicy+stager, reshaped call site to maybeAutoStage+mapErrorToExitCode, added ErrNothingStaged->exit 2 branch), removed the 4 superseded staging tests+fakeStager from run_test.go (+added ErrNothingStaged mapErrorToExitCode row), and created cmd/stagehand/stage_test.go with 7 MOCKING cases incl. the previously-missing auto-stage-then-proceed happy path via a stateful fakeStager. gofmt clean, go build ./... OK, go vet clean, go test ./cmd/stagehand/ ./internal/git/ -v passes (StagedFileCount + all 7 cases), go test ./... passes with no regression. Verified maybeAutoStage is the sole staging entry-point (AddAll only in stage.go), --no-auto-stage/AutoStageAll=false return ErrNothingStaged without AddAll (FR19), --all force-stages (FR20), FR18 notice carries (N files), both sentinels map to exit 2, notices go to stderr only (FR51), no testify, and pkg/stagehand/internal/generate/internal/provider/internal/config/main.go/providers.go/config.go are all UNCHANGED (v2 seam intact; restored the rebuilt tracked stagehand binary). Note: S1's TestPersistentFlags_Registered fails only under isolated -run (pre-existing cobra v1.10.2 Flags()-doesn't-merge-persistent latent bug) but passes in the full-suite gate, so it is out of scope and was left untouched."
}
```

Added (*Git).StagedFileCount() to internal/git/stage.go (+strings import, +2 tests), created cmd/stagehand/stage.go (ErrNothingStaged sentinel distinct from generate.ErrNothingToCommit, extended stager interface, maybeAutoStage per FR16-FR20 pseudocode), edited cmd/stagehand/run.go (deleted old maybeAutoStagePolicy+stager, reshaped call site to maybeAutoStage+mapErrorToExitCode, added ErrNothingStaged->exit 2 branch), removed the 4 superseded staging tests+fakeStager from run_test.go (+added ErrNothingStaged mapErrorToExitCode row), and created cmd/stagehand/stage_test.go with 7 MOCKING cases incl. the previously-missing auto-stage-then-proceed happy path via a stateful fakeStager. gofmt clean, go build ./... Note: S1's TestPersistentFlags_Registered fails only under isolated -run (pre-existing cobra v1.10.2 Flags()-doesn't-merge-persistent latent bug) but passes in the full-suite gate, so it is out of scope and was left untouched.

coderResult.message: P1.M7.T2.S2 implemented and all 5 validation gates pass. Reconciled S1's maybeAutoStagePolicy into the contract-faithful maybeAutoStage(...) error sole staging entry-point. Added (*Git).StagedFileCount() to internal/git/stage.go (+strings import, +2 tests), created cmd/stagehand/stage.go (ErrNothingStaged sentinel distinct from generate.ErrNothingToCommit, extended stager interface, maybeAutoStage per FR16-FR20 pseudocode), edited cmd/stagehand/run.go (deleted old maybeAutoStagePolicy+stager, reshaped call site to maybeAutoStage+mapErrorToExitCode, added ErrNothingStaged->exit 2 branch), removed the 4 superseded staging tests+fakeStager from run_test.go (+added ErrNothingStaged mapErrorToExitCode row), and created cmd/stagehand/stage_test.go with 7 MOCKING cases incl. the previously-missing auto-stage-then-proceed happy path via a stateful fakeStager. gofmt clean, go build ./... OK, go vet clean, go test ./cmd/stagehand/ ./internal/git/ -v passes (StagedFileCount + all 7 cases), go test ./... passes with no regression. Verified maybeAutoStage is the sole staging entry-point (AddAll only in stage.go), --no-auto-stage/AutoStageAll=false return ErrNothingStaged without AddAll (FR19), --all force-stages (FR20), FR18 notice carries (N files), both sentinels map to exit 2, notices go to stderr only (FR51), no testify, and pkg/stagehand/internal/generate/internal/provider/internal/config/main.go/providers.go/config.go are all UNCHANGED (v2 seam intact; restored the rebuilt tracked stagehand binary). Note: S1's TestPersistentFlags_Registered fails only under isolated -run (pre-existing cobra v1.10.2 Flags()-doesn't-merge-persistent latent bug) but passes in the full-suite gate, so it is out of scope and was left untouched.
